experiment: confident-learning label cleaning (SigLIP2 embeddings, 4-class silver -> binary gold eval)
method: 5-fold OOF logreg probs on train; drop examples where model confidently disagrees with silver label
conclusion: Cleaning does not improve the noise-robust winner (logreg 86.0% -> 83-85%, flat-to-down within CI); it rescues the overfitting MLP (+6.5pt) but not past the simple baseline. Self-cleaning removes info, cannot add it. To beat 86% needs independent relabeling or more data, not noise removal. Production decision unchanged.
